title: StrangeMatterComponentCoreSchema
description: Schema for Strange Matter Component specification defining the structure and metadata for components in the Strange Matter ecosystem

SchemaVersion.description: Version of the schema for this componnent.

Context.description: Project and document scope: path/location, document identity, project identifiers, and an optional alias.

Path.description: Path as a URI reference or URL (absolute or relative) for this component’s location in storage or a workspace.

Document.description: Identifies the file/model within the project, plus sheet or page and a position on it.

Name.description: Document identifier, file name, or model name (e.g. under the project Path).

SheetOrPage.description: Sheet name/number in CAD, BIM, or Excel; or page label/number in a PDF or similar.

PositionReference.description: Where on that sheet or page: e.g. title block cell, grid id, 2D/3D coordinates, view name, viewport, or other anchor the tool understands.

ProjectNumber.description: Project number or code (e.g. job or contract number).

Alias1.description: Optional alias or secondary label for this context.

SpatialContext.description: Hierarchical spatial context preserving location metadata across systems. Each item is one spatial level: the context type, the EntityGUID(s) of the entity instance(s) at that level, and optional attributes. Order items from outer/abstract to inner/specific as needed for your model.

oneOf.description: Standard spatial type of the instance(s) referenced at this level.
User-defined (non-standard) spatial type name for the instance(s) referenced at this level.

referencedEntityGUIDs.description: EntityGUIDs of the entity instance(s) this level refers to. Must match the document root EntityGUID field (same property in this schema). Use a single entry when one instance applies; multiple when this level groups several instances.

attributes.description: Optional string key-value pairs for this level. Use for domain- or tool-specific fields; or when contextType is non-standard and you need ad hoc keys beyond EntityGUID reference.

fractionalIndex.description: Merge-safe order key for this component within an ordered collection of components String-encoded fractional index in the open interval (0,1) with arbitrary precision; sort to determine order; insert by averaging two indices (Figma-style). See: https://www.figma.com/blog/realtime-editing-of-ordered-sequences/

Status.description: Lifecycle status of the component. Includes temporal states like expiration.
